title: Vileda SuperMocio 3Action XL Mop Refill - Pack of 2 - Fits all SuperMocio Mops- Authentic Vileda Mop Head Replacement - Machine Washable - Advanced Microfibre Technology
features: REMOVES OVER 99% OF BACTERIA WITH JUST WATER* - Whether it be dust, hair, liquid, crumbs or mud: Using the three-zones of the large microfibre mop, the Vileda SuperMocio 3Action XL refill removes over 99% of bacteria with just water.

DEEP-CLEANING POWER ZONES - Three different power zones with unique cleaning powers allow an optimal deep cleaning of your sealed hard floors at home. The red non-scratch scourer tackles stubborn dirt, the blue microfibre zone removes grease, and the 3D red power dots pick up hair and dirt particles.

REUSABLE AND MACHINE WASHABLE – Use a fresh and clean mop every time you want to clean your floors. Vileda SuperMocio 3Action is machine washable at up to 60 °C. Wash with similar textiles. The washable mop heads of this large mop can easily be cleaned in your washing machine without losing efficiency.

LEMON SHAPED HEAD - The uniquely lemon-shaped Vileda mop head easily cleans hard-to-reach spots like corners and under furniture. This machine-washable mop head refill is compatible with all Vileda SuperMocio mop handles, allowing you to detach and reattach it to fit your cleaning style.

HIGHLY ABSORBENT FIBRES - With the highly absorbent fibres, even large spills and excess water get soaked up with ease, optimizing the drying process. The Supermocio XL twin pack refill offers double the cleaning power, perfect for tackling large areas efficiently.
description: From the manufacturer Vileda SuperMocio 3 Action refill With the Vileda SuperMocio 3Action refill, you can easily deep-clean hard floor surfaces all around the home. Order the Vileda SuperMocio 3Action refill now! Three cleaning actions for effective cleaning Experience the power of three products in one string mop refill with Vileda SuperMocio 3Action. Red non-scratch scourers remove even stubborn dirt, blue microfibre zones tackle greasy residue and 3D red dots are ideal for extra hair and particle pick up. Furthermore, thanks to the advanced microfibre technology, up to 99% of bacteria gets removed with just water*! Benefits Removes up to 99% of bacteria with just water* Suitable for all sealed hard floors Machine washable at up to 60℃ Easy corner cleaning Deep-cleaning power With three mopping zones, you can clean any kind of dirt off all sealed hard floor surfaces around the home. Advanced microfibre technology Thanks to Vileda's advanced microfibre technology, the string mop refill easily removes stubborn dirt and up to 99% of bacteria with just water*. Unique lemon shaped head With the unique lemon-shaped head, you can easily clean those hard-to-reach spots like corners. Machine washable and reusable After use the string mop refill can be washed in your washing machine at up to 60℃. Wash with similar textiles. For consistent cleaning power, replace every 6 months. Suitable for sealed hard floors Vileda SuperMocio 3Action refill is ideal for use on all sealed hard floor surfaces. Highly absorbent strands Thanks to the unique fibre composition excess water and spills can be soaked up with ease. Order your Vileda SuperMocio 3Action refill now! *Removes E. coli & S. aureus from hardwood floor & ceramic tile as tested at a 3rd party lab.
